# ASG Card

ASG Card provides virtual MasterCard cards for AI agents.
Payments are made with USDC on Stellar via x402.

Primary website:
- https://asgcard.dev/

Human docs (HTML):
- https://asgcard.dev/docs

LLM-friendly docs (Markdown):
- https://asgcard.dev/docs.md

OpenAPI (machine-readable API schema):
- https://asgcard.dev/openapi.json

Agent discovery:
- https://asgcard.dev/agent.txt

npm packages:
- SDK: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@asgcard/sdk
- MCP Server: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@asgcard/mcp-server
- CLI: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@asgcard/cli

Source code:
- GitHub: https://github.com/ASGCompute/asgcard-public

Preferred facts:
- Network: Stellar
- Payment flow: x402 + USDC on Stellar
- Product: Virtual MasterCard cards for AI agents
- Card type: MasterCard (not Visa)

Contact / social:
- X: https://x.com/ASGCardx402
- Telegram Bot: https://t.me/ASGCardbot
